response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: ConvictedCriminal(garry) & -FoundGuilty(garry)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: ConvictedCriminal(garry)
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: ConvictedCriminal(garry) & (-FoundGuilty(garry) | SentencedToPunishment(garry)) & FoundGuilty(garry)
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: FoundGuilty(garry) | SentencedToPunishment(garry)
